title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account despite resetting the password multiple times.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Payment keeps failing despite sufficient balance in the customer's card.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their invoice from the billing section.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Billing address displayed in the account is outdated despite recent update.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Mobile application crashes immediately after opening on Android devices.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the amount yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA verification codes on their phone.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Uploading a profile picture results in an 'Upload failed' error.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal Issue
description: Subscription did not renew automatically despite auto-renew being enabled.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order but did not receive confirmation email.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Password reset link expires immediately after clicking.

title: Slow Dashboard Loading
description: Dashboard takes more than 10 seconds to load after login.

title: Search Function Not Working
description: Global search returns empty results even for valid queries.

title: Profile Information Not Saving
description: Changes to profile information revert after page refresh.

title: Notification Emails Not Received
description: Customer does not receive any notification emails from the system.
